name: Oriental Sweet-And-Sour Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Red bell pepper strips, cut in half
1/2 cup Bite-size pieces fresh Chinese pea pods
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salad as directed on the package.
2. In a bowl, stir vinegar, soy sauce, and sugar into the oil-water mixture.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl and mix well.
4. Toss the mixture with Parmesan cheese.
6 servings.
